items.name: Gwen
items.text:
Gwen.
Young adult female.
Olive skin tone.
Shoulder-length messy black hair.
Upturned dark brown eyes.
Dark eyeliner and smoky eyeshadow.
Full lips.
Mature, realistic feminine facial structure.
High cheekbones.
Athletic warrior physique.
Broad shoulders.
Athletic V-shaped torso.
Shoulders noticeably broader than hips.
Strong back and upper body.
Defined deltoids and forearms.
Visible muscle definition throughout the body.
Lean abdomen.
Firm waist.
Powerful legs.
Dense athletic musculature.
Low body fat.
Functional strength rather than bodybuilder proportions.
Fast, agile physique.
Compact powerful frame.
Physical strength is the dominant feature of her silhouette.
Small bust.
Smaller chest relative to shoulders.
Body proportions emphasize athleticism over curves.
Confident physical presence.
Intense expression.
Watchful eyes.
Determined demeanor.
Battle-hardened appearance.
Expressive face.
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Tara
items.text:
Young adult elf female.
Fair skin tone.
Long Straight golden blonde hair.
Ice Blue eyes.
Natural beauty.
Youthful, soft facial structure.
High pronounced cheekbones.
Tara has a soft curvy physique.
Wide hips.
Broad pelvis.
Heavy thighs.
Full lower body.
Narrow waist.
Very full bust.
Prominent chest silhouette.
Balanced hourglass proportions.
Curvy feminine figure.
Bust and hips are the dominant features of her silhouette.
Graceful physical presence.
Elegant expression.
Knowing eyes.
Thoughtful demeanor.
Composed appearance.
Expressive face.
smooth skin.
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Kip
items.text:
Kip
Young adult elf man.
Tan skin tone.
Long Straight golden blonde hair.
Ice Blue eyes.
Natural beauty.
Youthful, soft facial structure.
High pronounced cheekbones.
Narrow jaw.
Thin Lips.
Narrow shoulders
Wiry physique.
No body hair.
Painterly skin texture.
Expressive face.
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Raziel
items.text:
Raziel.
Adult demon-blooded human male.
Red skin.
Two segmented bonelike black 18 inch curved horns from brow line.
Smooth bald head.
Black soul patch goatee.
Bare upper lip.
Matching black tribal tattoos around eyes.
Symmetrical geometric occult tattoos across scalp, chest, back, and limbs.

High cheekbones.
Thin, sharp facial structure.
Thin nose.
Thin {deep red | black} lips.
Yellow wolf-like upturned deep-set eyes.
Black eyeliner.

Athletic rock climber physique.
Lean muscular build.
Strong back and upper body.
Long lean limbs.
Very low body fat.
Fast, agile body type.
Human proportions emphasizing speed over bulk.
Long prehensile devil tail

Controlled expression.
Reserved demeanor.
Measured gaze.
Quiet intensity.
Emotion held beneath the surface.
Ambiguous moral presence.
Neither heroic nor monstrous in tone.
Complex, layered personality implied through expression rather than caricature.

Formidable physical presence.
Morally natural assassin for the goddess of the shadow realm
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Amity
items.text:
Amity.
Adult demon-blood human female.
Muted purple skin.
Two segmented bonelike off-white 18 inch curved horns from brow.
Long rich and shiny purple straight hair.
Symmetrical purple ritualistic tattoos on body and limbs.

High cheekbones.
Thin, sharp facial structure.
Thin nose.
Thin {deep purple | black} lips.
Black  upturned deep-set eyes radiating with eerier purple energy..
Double think Egyptian eyeliner.

Graceful posture.
Long elegant neck.
Refined movement.
Fluid body language.
Elongated silhouette.
6 feet tall.
Long limbs.
Low body fat.
Lean abdomen.
Fast, agile physique.
Small bust.
High prominent collarbones.
Long prehensile devil tail.

Sultry expression.
Flirty demeanor.
Captivating presence.
Hard to ignore.
Self-assured smile.
Playful confidence.
Knowing expression.
Magnetic personality.
Effortlessly commands attention.
Natural charisma.

Alluring posture and body langue.
Arcane energy surrounds her.
Purple magical light dances around her hands.
Mystical power visibly radiates from her presence.
Reality subtly bends around her magic.
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Mippy
items.text:
Mippy.
Grandmother Gnome adventurer.
Silver hair gathered into a practical bun.

Cherubic plump round face.
Button nose.
Full lips.
Downturned kind eyes.
Rosy cheeks.
Gentle wrinkles earned through centuries of laughter and grief.
Age lines around eyes and mouth.
Weathered but healthy appearance.
Advanced age carried with dignity.

Short stature.
Soft sturdy build.
Very full bust.
Prominent chest silhouette.
Comforting grandmotherly presence.

Warm welcoming smile.
Approachable demeanor.
Natural kindness.
Patient listener.
Calming presence..

Eyes reveal centuries of experience.
Old grief hidden behind warmth.
Carries the memory of countless companions.
Wisdom earned through loss and perseverance.
Optimistic smile conceals a sorrowful heart.

Veteran adventurer.
Master healer.
Hands accustomed to healing magic.
Generations of experience caring for others.
A wise old soul who has outlived many friends yet still chooses compassion.
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Wraif
items.text:
Wraif.
Adult half-elf male (late 30s in human equivalent).
Tan skin tone.
Shoulder-length dark brown hair, deliberately styled to obscure pointed elf ears.
Small pointed elf ears partially concealed.
Clean shaven.

High cheekbones.
Narrow jaw.
Slim, refined facial structure.
Slightly weathered features suggesting maturity and life experience.

Almond-shaped hazel eyes.
Constantly observant gaze.
Eyes scanning surroundings and people as if evaluating risk and opportunity.

Lean but healthy physique.
Narrow shoulders and hips.
Subtle athletic conditioning without bulk.

Controlled facial expression.
Reserved demeanor.
Measured and calculating presence.
Often difficult to read emotionally.

Calculating opportunist who prioritizes personal advantage while cooperating when beneficial.
Naturally assesses people and situations for leverage, risk, and backup options.
Frequently thinking several steps ahead.
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Kanasha
items.text:
Kanasha.

Young adult woman.

Light skin tone.
African facial features.
Long hair.
Very thin micro-dreadlocks with clear strand separation and visible individual locks.

Brown eyes.
Dark eyeliner.
Full lips.

Mature realistic facial structure.
High cheekbones.
Strong elegant jawline.

Lean athletic physique.
Feminine dancer's physique.
Long powerful legs.
Strong core musculature.
Exceptional stamina and agility.
Built for speed and endurance rather than brute strength.

Smooth skin texture.

Right forearm and hand heavily tattooed.
Left thigh tattooed.

Very small bust.

Watchful expression.
Measured demeanor.
Patient hunter's gaze.
Calm under pressure.
Disciplined confidence.
Always aware of her surroundings.

Veteran dragon hunter.
Experienced wilderness tracker.
Comfortable facing dangerous creatures.
Moves with practiced caution.
Carries herself like someone who has survived encounters that should have killed her.

Sun-kissed complexion.
Graceful bearing.

:1.5
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Edric
items.text:
Edric

Middle-aged adult man.

Tan skin tone.
Long messy straight light brown hair.
Ice-blue eyes.

Traditionally handsome features.
Mature realistic facial structure.
High cheekbones.
Strong jaw.
Straight nose.
Weathered masculine appearance.

Broad shoulders.
Lean athletic physique.
Strong back and upper body.
Powerful legs built from years of hiking and climbing.
Functional strength rather than warrior musculature.

Stylish well-kept beard.
Some body hair.
Rugged skin texture.
Sun-weathered complexion.

Expressive human face.
Intelligent eyes.
Calm demeanor.
Patient expression.
Quiet confidence.
Deeply observant.
Thoughtful presence.
Feels completely at ease in the wilderness.

Large elk antlers growing naturally from the skull.
Antlers are asymmetrical and realistic.
Antlers integrated into the anatomy rather than worn as decoration.

Ancient druidic presence.
Strong connection to the natural world.
Wise but approachable.
Protective of wild places.
Carries himself with the calm certainty of someone who follows the rhythms of nature rather than society.

Looks like a man who has spent decades living beneath open skies.
items.author: BTP_Art
